scripts.bot:daemon: sh -c 'mkdir -p .runtime; if [ -f .runtime/project-pilot.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat .runtime/project-pilot.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo "ProjectPilot already running: $(cat .runtime/project-pilot.pid)"; else nohup npm start > .runtime/project-pilot.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .runtime/project-pilot.pid; echo "ProjectPilot started: $(cat .runtime/project-pilot.pid)"; fi'
scripts.bot:status: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/project-pilot.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat .runtime/project-pilot.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo "ProjectPilot running: $(cat .runtime/project-pilot.pid)"; else echo "ProjectPilot not running"; fi; ps -axo pid,ppid,command | grep -E "(ts-node src/index.ts|lark-cli event \+subscribe|npm start)" | grep -v grep || true'
scripts.bot:stop: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/project-pilot.pid ]; then kill $(cat .runtime/project-pilot.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm .runtime/project-pilot.pid; fi; pkill -f "ts-node src/index.ts" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "lark-cli event +subscribe" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.bot:install: sh -c 'mkdir -p .runtime; launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.projectpilot.bot.plist 2>/dev/null || true; launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.projectpilot.bot.plist; launchctl enable gui/$(id -u)/com.projectpilot.bot; launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.projectpilot.bot'
